name: Add HS (Harmonised System) Tariff Codes to Maropost Commerce Products
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Harmonized Commodity Description and Coding System (also known as the Harmonized System (HS)) is a worldwide standard system of names and numbers to classify traded products. The HS forms a part of all international free trade agreements. For more information about the HS Code, please see the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://ftaportal.dfat.gov.au/help/hs-code", "children": [{"text": "Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade's"}]}, {"text": " website."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Merchants sending international orders are required to put a HS code for the product/s on customs declaration forms. For convenience, this code can be added to every product in Neto in bulk."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Update HS Tariff Number on Products"}], "data-id": "update-hs-tariff-number-on-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "While you can update each product individually, it's much easier to add the HS Tariff to each product in bulk, via export/import. First, create a file with a list of your product SKUs, category and name."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Export Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform Complex Export", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and choose "}, {"text": "Start Data Export Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill in the "}, {"text": "Name Your File", "bold": true}, {"text": " field and click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New Field to File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button four times, and select the "}, {"text": "SKU*", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Product Category Full Path List", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "HS Tariff Number", "bold": true}, {"text": " fields. The name and category will help you identify which codes to apply to your products."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button until you're ready to generate the file. In the "}, {"text": "Send Export File to", "bold": true}, {"text": " field select "}, {"text": "Local URL", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This will save the file in your site database so that you can download it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Export Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and confirm by clicking "}, {"text": "Ok", "bold": true}, {"text": ". The export process will be automatically started, and you will also see a URL you can click on to download the file."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can either check the process has run (by clicking on it and looking for a "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": " status) or wait five minutes and click the URL to download the file."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the file and add the codes to the HS tariff field in your spreadsheet. You can find a list of codes on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://ftaportal.dfat.gov.au/help/hs-code", "children": [{"text": "DFAT website"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When complete, save your file so it can be uploaded."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The file can now be imported. Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform Complex Import", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and choose "}, {"text": "Start Data Import Wizard", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Browse", "bold": true}, {"text": " to select the exported file you downloaded, then click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set the "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Product Category", "bold": true}, {"text": " lines to "}, {"text": "Ignore Column", "bold": true}, {"text": ", as they don't need to be updated. The "}, {"text": "HS Tariff Number", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "SKU*", "bold": true}, {"text": " will already be mapped correctly. Click "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to advance through the import steps, and click the "}, {"text": "Process File Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button when you get to it."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An automatic process will import the product file you've uploaded."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your products are now updated with the HS Tariff number."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
